description: Pair-level truth buckets for Synthetic Corpus v2. Page IDs are canonical; document/page fields are conveniences.

must_match.reason: Same native page rendered identically in received and email records, with an intra-group received duplicate.
Same native page rendered identically in received and email records, with an intra-group received duplicate.

Clean imaging report duplicated as a degraded fax scan with header, noise, skew, border, compression, and low resolution.
Born-digital instruction page paired with a clean image-only scan; OCR is needed for text on scan side.
Clean authorization page paired with a rotated, cropped, shadowed claimant camera upload.

Same underlying visit content expressed with semantic paraphrases; embedding/LLM-relevant later.
Same visit content expressed with medical abbreviation variants: hypertension/HTN, shortness of breath/SOB, diabetes mellitus/DM, follow up/f/u.
Born-digital note paired with scan containing OCR-trap substitutions such as pain->pa1n and lisinopril->IisinopriI.
